name: sglang-speculative-decode-fix
description: Qwen3.5-397B-A17B-FP8 generates garbage/crashes with EAGLE speculative decoding on ROCm due to upstream GPU compute library bug
task_description_source: GitHub issue sgl-project/sglang#21566 (symptom only, no root cause)

version_pins.note: TP=2 required for model serving, 2x MI355X. Pre-fix code causes deadlock (spec decode) or GPU hardware exception (non-spec) on first inference request.
